seoDescription: Governance, history, leadership, and institutional structure of the Centre for Plant Medicine Research.
introParagraphs: The Centre for Plant Medicine Research (CPMR) is Ghana's national institution for scientific inquiry into plant-based medicine, bridging traditional knowledge with contemporary research practice.

Use the links below to explore our mandate, leadership, governance bodies, and partnerships. Each section is maintained as verified institutional content for government, research, and public audiences.

links.description: Institutional introduction and how this section is organised.

links.description: Our direction and purpose as a national research centre.
